description: Lint a clinical decision support document (.tex/.md/.txt) for required sections, evidence citations, GRADE recommendation grading, statistical-reporting completeness, biomarker nomenclature, and potential HIPAA identifiers; write a validation report.
rules: read-only — reads one document, writes only the validation report under record_store
the porter never propagates the core's non-zero exit (errors/warnings still produce a report)
usage: Set DOC (path to the document to lint). Output: validation_report.txt.
limitation: Heuristic regex checks only — HIPAA and citation detection are best-effort, not a compliance guarantee. Pure Python stdlib.
